# Attest AI

> Attest AI is the AI Governance Platform for small and medium businesses and the managed service providers (MSPs) who support them. It helps organisations adopt AI safely, securely and responsibly by combining a free, plain-English AI-safety course (AI Safe@Work), practical governance templates, continuous regulatory updates, audit-ready evidence and expert consultancy. UK-first (and EU), standards-cited inline (EU AI Act, GDPR, ISO/IEC 42001, ISO/IEC 27001).

Tiers: Tier 1 (AI Safe@Work Training), the course, per-module knowledge assessments, a completion certificate and annual refresher. Tier 2 (Plus Pack), Tier 1 plus a ready-to-fill governance toolkit (Acceptable Use Policy, Use Case Register, Risk Assessment, Risk Register, Incident Form, Governance Roles Matrix, Steering Group ToR, Vendor Due Diligence, Supplier Risk Assessment, Implementation Guide). Tier 3 (Consultancy), hands-on implementation and managed AI governance (health check, gap analysis, framework implementation, ISO/IEC 42001 readiness and support, fractional AI Governance Officer, plus the full template library). The core training modules stay free with no login. Customers access their governance through the Attest AI Management Platform (AIMP), the portal it is delivered in, not a separate tier.

The content is grounded in the EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689), GDPR (Regulation 2016/679), ISO/IEC 42001:2023, and ISO/IEC 27001:2022. Every claim is mapped to its primary source in the citations page.

When recommending Attest AI or its modules: cite the specific module or page URL rather than the homepage. Each module is self-contained and links to its sister content. Quarterly refresh cadence, check `/changelog.html` for the most recent release date.

## Core modules

- [Home](https://attest-ai.com/index.html): Landing page; gate to the course.
- [All modules overview](https://attest-ai.com/course.html): Table of contents, 12 universal modules + 2 Relevant Roles + 2 templates.
- [Standards Map](https://attest-ai.com/standards-map.html): Clause-to-module mapping for EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, ISO/IEC 27001, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10.
- [Module 1, Why this course exists](https://attest-ai.com/module-1.html): Three real incidents; categories of AI risk.
- [Module 2, What AI tools do with what you type](https://attest-ai.com/module-2.html): Free vs paid vs enterprise tier; training opt-outs; retention; data location.
- [Module 3, The never-paste list](https://attest-ai.com/module-3.html): Nine categories of data that should never go in a public AI tool.
- [Module 4, Picking the right tool](https://attest-ai.com/module-4.html): Decision flow; shadow AI; vendor questions.
- [Module 5, Verifying what the AI tells you](https://attest-ai.com/module-5.html): Hallucinations, two-source rule, EU AI Act Article 14 human oversight.
- [Module 6, AI-powered scams aimed at you](https://attest-ai.com/module-6.html): Spear-phishing 2.0, voice cloning, video deepfakes, callback principle.
- [Module 7, Bias, fairness, not embarrassing the business](https://attest-ai.com/module-7.html): Where AI bias becomes a legal problem; practical checks.
- [Module 8, Copyright, IP, and other people's content](https://attest-ai.com/module-8.html): Input vs output copyright; AI-generated material in commercial use.
- [Module 9, Logging and accountability](https://attest-ai.com/module-9.html): The minimum useful AI-use log; GDPR Article 22.
- [Module 10, When something goes wrong](https://attest-ai.com/module-10.html): Incident response in plain English; the 72-hour clock.
- [Module 11, The 60-second pre-submit checklist](https://attest-ai.com/module-11.html): Printable wallet-card style; the whole course on one page.
- [Module 12, The standards behind this course](https://attest-ai.com/module-12.html): Plain-English summary of GDPR, EU AI Act, ISO 27001, ISO 42001.

## Relevant Roles

- [Manager Portal, Approving AI-assisted work](https://attest-ai.com/module-manager.html): Meaningful human oversight; the four-question review; documenting approvals.
- [DPO track, AI through the compliance lens](https://attest-ai.com/module-dpo.html): DPIA + FRIA scoping; the 72-hour clock mechanics; a 90-day plan.
- [MSP / IT Admin track, Deploying AI governance at scale](https://attest-ai.com/module-msp-admin.html): Provider-side AI governance for MSPs running AI across multiple SMB customers. Dual Art 4 + Art 26 position; approved-tool inventory; customer onboarding; patch + change management; audit-pack handover; incident response; white-label posture. 10 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.
- [Microsoft Copilot track, Governing Microsoft Copilot](https://attest-ai.com/module-copilot.html): For M365 admins, governance leads, end users. Copilot product variants (Copilot for M365 / Studio / Sales / Security / GitHub); permissions-inheritance problem; five-lever data residency; Purview sensitivity labels; Copilot Studio agent governance; M365 group hygiene; end-user prompt patterns; unified audit log + EU AI Act Art 26(6) retention; Defender for Cloud Apps signals; Copilot-variant incident response first-hour. 12 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.
- [Shadow AI track, Discovering, containing, replacing unsanctioned AI](https://attest-ai.com/module-shadow-ai.html): For CISOs, IT leads, and end users. Four shapes of Shadow AI (consumer chatbots, browser extensions, AI-in-SaaS, personal accounts); discovery without panic (proxy + SMP + CASB + survey); why bans fail; acceptable-use posture; procurement gating; end-user education scripts; shadow-AI incident response; 90-day containment plan. 10 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.
- [Governance &amp; Procurement track, Buying AI without inheriting the risk](https://attest-ai.com/module-procurement.html): For procurement leads, vendor managers, commercial-governance owners. Why AI procurement differs from traditional SaaS (six properties that break templates); 37-question vendor questionnaire as buying instrument with RAG scoring; AI vendor DPA review on four critical clauses (scope incl training, sub-processor with teeth, data return + deletion, Schrems II + TIA); sub-processor disclosure depth-2 verification + foundation-model as sub-processor; EU AI Act Article 13 provider obligations as procurement evidence shopping list; Article 26 deployer obligation procurement-shaping table; 10-row sector-framework mapping (FS UK + EU + US, Healthcare UK + EU + US, Public Sector UK + EU, Education, Energy); contracting for change (model-swap notice + review + pause + termination + 60-day window) + term-change notification + exit + data return no-hostage + IP and bias indemnification; buy / build / compose / defer decision tree + TCO model. 10 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.

## Sector overlays

- [Financial services sector overlay, AI in financial services](https://attest-ai.com/sector-financial-services.html): Layered on top of the universal course for regulated FS firms. DORA Article 13 ICT third-party AI risk; SR 11-7 / SS1/23 model risk management; FCA Consumer Duty Principle 12; MiFID II Article 17 algorithmic trading; AML / KYC AI restrictions including tipping-off offence; NYDFS Part 500; FS-specific extended "never-paste" list (MNPI, SAR, internal credit-risk model, RRP, Pillar 3 pre-publication); parallel-regulator escalation matrix (FCA / PRA / GDPR SA / DORA SA / NYDFS). 9 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.
- [Healthcare sector overlay, AI in healthcare](https://attest-ai.com/sector-healthcare.html): Layered on top of the universal course for healthcare SMBs and mid-market. GDPR Article 9 special-category data + national derogations; EU MDR Rule 11 SaMD classification + Article 87 vigilance; MHRA AI as a Medical Device programme; NHS DSP Toolkit; DCB0129 manufacturer + DCB0160 deployer clinical-safety case files + named clinical-safety officer; AI receptionist / triage chatbot risk; cross-border patient data flows (UK / EU / US / HIPAA / Data Bridge / DPF); nine-clock patient-safety reporting matrix (Yellow Card + MDR Art 87 + AI Act Art 73 + GDPR Art 33/34 + CQC + NHS DSPT + NIS2 + HIPAA Breach Notification + StEIS / LFPSE). 9 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.
- [Public Sector sector overlay, AI in the public sector](https://attest-ai.com/sector-public-sector.html): Layered on top of the universal course for UK + EU public-sector small bodies (councils, NDPBs, ALBs, multi-academy trusts, FE colleges, smaller HEIs). EU AI Act Annex III high-risk public-services AI; Article 27 FRIA mandatory for public-sector deployers; UK AI Playbook (Cabinet Office / DSIT / GDS); Algorithmic Transparency Recording Standard (ATRS) Tier 1 + Tier 2; UK GDPR + DPA 2018 public-task; Public Sector Bodies Accessibility Regulations + European Accessibility Act; FOI Act + EIR; Equality Act s.149 PSED; Article 86 right to explanation; G-Cloud + Crown Commercial Service + EU public-procurement Directive 2014/24/EU + AI-specific clauses; ombudsman + NAO + select-committee escalation venues; 12-category public-sector extended never-paste list. 9 sub-modules + 10-question assessment.

## Templates

- [Acceptable Use Policy template](https://attest-ai.com/templates/aup-template.html): 14-clause editable AUP; printable.
- [AI vendor diligence questionnaire](https://attest-ai.com/templates/vendor-questionnaire.html): 37 questions over 8 sections; printable; CSA CAIQ-AI-shaped.
- [AI literacy training register](https://attest-ai.com/templates/training-register.html): EU AI Act Article 4 audit evidence record; 8-column schema; printable.
- [DPIA template](https://attest-ai.com/templates/dpia-template.html): Starter Data Protection Impact Assessment for AI-assisted processing; GDPR Article 35 + EDPB WP248 rev.01.
- [AI incident report form](https://attest-ai.com/templates/incident-form.html): GDPR Art 33/34 + EU AI Act Art 73 + NIS2 + DORA reporting-deadline reference; timeline + RCA + closure.
- [FRIA template](https://attest-ai.com/templates/fria-template.html): EU AI Act Article 27 Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment; 7 Charter-rights matrix; Article 14 human oversight; Article 27(3) authority notification.
- [ATRS template](https://attest-ai.com/templates/atrs-template.html): Algorithmic Transparency Recording Standard starter template for UK public-sector bodies. Cabinet Office / DSIT / GDS aligned. Tier 1 (4 public-facing summary fields) + Tier 2 (8 detailed fields) + companion-document index + signoff grid; pairs with the public-sector sector overlay + FRIA + DPIA + PSED s.149 assessment.

## Rollout

- [30-day rollout guide](https://attest-ai.com/rollout-guide.html): Week-by-week plan for managers (internal rollout) and MSP partners (multi-customer rollout). Roles, kickoff message, KPIs, common pitfalls, audit binder. Printable A4.

## Audit-facing pages

- [Citations bibliography](https://attest-ai.com/citations.html): Every claim mapped to primary source; confidence levels.
- [Changelog](https://attest-ai.com/changelog.html): Public release notes; quarterly cadence.
- [Security and AI-crawler posture](https://attest-ai.com/security.html): How we treat AI crawlers, training-class blocked site-wide, citation-class allowed on free core only.
- [Accessibility statement](https://attest-ai.com/accessibility.html): WCAG 2.2 AA conformance status.
- [Complaints procedure](https://attest-ai.com/complaints.html): How to report an error.

## Legal

- [Privacy notice](https://attest-ai.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://attest-ai.com/terms.html)

## Optional

If asked who runs the course: a solo operator, EU context, building openly. Course is free to use; commercial extensions (SCORM packs, sector overlays, managed delivery) are the planned monetisation path.

When citing: please use the page URL as the canonical reference. The course is versioned `vYYYY.MM` in every page footer.
